2026/05/18 19:06:25.582383766 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582410175 {

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582423049 new <- list()

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582518818 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582531912 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582532723 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582546099 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582546920 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582584130 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582585342 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582610068 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582611020 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582626789 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582627651 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582640725 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582641517 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582655553 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582656334 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582679958 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582680870 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582698593 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582699324 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582713481 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582714322 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582732396 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582733168 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582747554 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582748456 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582768534 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582769385 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582786296 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582802647 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582803419 "default"))
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582818787 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582819569 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582836821 }
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582837703 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582855185 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582856107 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582870664 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582871455 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582886083 }
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582887015 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582904908 }
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582905819 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582918453 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582933611 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),

2026/05/18 19:06:25.582949371 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582950152 }
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582962706 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582963557 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582981270 }
2026/05/18 19:06:25.582982142 version <- old$version

2026/05/18 19:06:25.583070193 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
